10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - red | 2 Pieces - BIKE24
10.evidenceText: Airflow is improved by up to 300%, allowing for effortless tire pressure adjustments for all riding styles—even with tubeless setups. The durable CoreCap valve
10.extractionRationale: The provided content snippet contains no pricing information. Only product feature descriptions are present.

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct CoreCap product URLs identified: p1993551.html (80mm Kupfer), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer), p1993548.html (80mm schwarz). Sources 3 and 5 are accessories (valve tool and damping sticker), not CoreCap valve products.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for CoreCap valves only. Excluded Source 3 (CoreControl valve tool - accessory) and Source 5 (SteadyValve damping sticker - accessory). The three CoreCap valve listings represent different SKUs/variants of the same product line but distinct product pages.

30.evidenceText: Product listings from Bike24 for Schwalbe Clik Valve products (60mm, 80mm, 40mm valves, conversion kit). None of the 5 sources contain stock status information such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or similar indicators.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text. The product content appears to be truncated product descriptions and overview pages without stock availability information. Following the instruction that if stock status cannot be determined, return null.

56.evidenceText: Multiple Schwalbe inner tube models identified with Clik Valve (SCV) interface: No. 19, No. 17, No. 19L-EL, No. 15-EL, No. 19-EL, No. 15L, No. 19L, Nr. 15, Nr. 10, Nr. 12, Nr. 13, Nr. 6, Nr. 3, Nr. 7
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models/SKUs explicitly labeled with Clik Valve (SCV) or SCV interface across all five sources. Each unique model number and size combination counts as one distinct SKU. Excluded valves, conversion kits, and accessories as instructed.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: The source shows the most recent price (Oct 29, 2025) as 1,793.99. Based on investing.com's standard format for metal premiums, this is quoted in cents per pound. Converting to USD/lb: 1,793.99 cents ÷ 100 = $17.94/lb
